profile.reasoning: Dataset successfully profiled with comprehensive statistics covering all column types and distributions. Detected appropriate data types and identified key characteristics.

Consider encoding categorical variables using appropriate strategies

quality.reasoning: Comprehensive quality assessment completed with detailed anomaly detection. Multiple quality dimensions analyzed including duplicates, outliers, inconsistencies, and data type issues.
quality.impact: Identifies critical data quality issues that could impact model performance and business decisions. Priority issues require immediate attention.
recommendations: Remove 150 duplicate rows to ensure data integrity
Apply IQR-based outlier handling to salary and price columns
Standardize categorical values in status column
Investigate and resolve data type mismatches in 3 columns

feature.reasoning: Feature analysis reveals significant correlations and multicollinearity patterns. Several high-value engineering opportunities identified.
feature.impact: Provides actionable insights for feature engineering and model optimization. Addressing multicollinearity can improve model interpretability.
recommendations: Remove one feature from each highly correlated pair to reduce multicollinearity
Create interaction features between salary and tenure
Apply log transformation to right-skewed price variable
Consider polynomial features for non-linear relationships

suggestions.reasoning: Strong positive correlation suggests multiplicative effect
Right-skewed distribution benefits from log transformation
High cardinality categorical requires target encoding

stat.reasoning: Statistical tests reveal important distributional properties and relationships. Most numeric features show non-normal distributions.
stat.impact: Informs appropriate statistical methods and transformation strategies for modeling.
recommendations: Apply Box-Cox or Yeo-Johnson transformations to normalize distributions
Use non-parametric tests for hypothesis testing on non-normal features
Consider robust scaling methods instead of standardization
Investigate bimodal distributions for potential data segmentation

tests.interpretation: Significant difference in means between groups

transform.reasoning: Comprehensive transformation strategy developed based on quality issues and feature characteristics.
transform.impact: Proposed transformations will significantly improve data quality and model readiness.
recommendations: Execute high-priority transformations immediately
Validate results after each transformation batch
Monitor data distribution changes after transformations
Document all transformation decisions for reproducibility
